title: EvidenceObject
description: An immutable, content-addressed artifact produced by an investigation or tool.

evidence_id.description: The unique, deterministic hash identifier of this evidence.

type.description: The type of evidence (e.g., entity, relation, document).

source_id.description: The identifier of the source or tool that produced this evidence.

data.description: The deterministic content of the evidence.

provenance.description: Information about how this evidence was derived.
